ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the participant */,
  "completion_code" TEXT /* Completion code for the participant's study session */,
  "study_session_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's study session */,
  "study_session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the participant's study session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "sur_rate" REAL /* Rate of surprise response */,
  "hap_rate" REAL /* Rate of happiness response */,
  "ang_rate" REAL /* Rate of anger response */,
  "amb_rate" REAL /* Rate of ambiguity response */,
  "pos_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive response */,
  "neg_rate" REAL /* Rate of negative response */,
  "amw_rate" REAL /* Rate of amusement response */,
  "pow_rate" REAL /* Rate of power response */,
  "new_rate" REAL /* Rate of newness response */,
  "all_amb_rate" REAL /* Overall ambiguity rate */,
  "all_pos_rate" REAL /* Overall positive rate */,
  "all_neg_rate" REAL /* Overall negative rate */,
  "sur_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for surprise response */,
  "hap_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for happiness response */,
  "ang_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for anger response */,
  "amb_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for ambiguity response */,
  "pos_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for positive response */,
  "neg_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for negative response */,
  "amw_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for amusement response */,
  "pow_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for power response */,
  "new_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for newness response */,
  "sur_neg_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for negative surprise response */,
  "sur_pos_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for positive surprise response */,
  "amb_neg_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for negative ambiguity response */,
  "amb_pos_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for positive ambiguity response */,
  "amw_neg_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for negative amusement response */,
  "amw_pos_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for positive amusement response */,
  "face_bad" INTEGER /* Count of bad facial expression responses */,
  "iaps_bad" INTEGER /* Count of bad IAPS image responses */,
  "word_bad" INTEGER /* Count of bad word responses */,
  "bad" INTEGER /* Overall bad response count */,
  "response_confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant's response */,
  "response_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the participant's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., facial expression, image, word) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_responses" (
  "stimulus_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant response */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time for the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., self-reported, physiological) */,
  "stimulus_response_value" REAL /* Value of the stimulus response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "researcher_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "researcher_department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "study_participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the study (e.g., participant, researcher) */,
  "study_participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant in the study (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the report is based on */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
